title: Add logo and hero background image

requirements.text: Add the uploaded logo image (gold sun + lightning bolt icon on navy background) to the Header component. Save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png and display it in the top-left of the navigation bar alongside the brand name.
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image appears in the Header component at the top-left of the navigation bar
The logo is appropriately sized (height ~40–48px) and does not break the header layout
The logo is visible on both mobile and desktop viewports

requirements.text: Replace the current Hero section background with the uploaded photo of the TRI-GITA SERVICES building (1772177297346.png). Save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.png and set it as the full-screen background image of the Hero component, with a dark overlay to ensure text remains legible.

quotes: Add 2nd image as the hero background

acceptanceCriteria: The TRI-GITA SERVICES building photo is displayed as the full-screen hero background
A semi-transparent dark overlay is applied over the image so headline and CTA text remain clearly readable
The background image covers the full hero section width and height (background-size: cover)
The previous AI illustration background is no longer shown

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Static assets must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
nonGoals: Changing any other sections beyond the Header and Hero
Modifying backend logic or data models

edits: Crop to square and remove navy background, keeping only the gold sun and lightning bolt icon on a transparent background (Screenshot_20260228_060558_Chrome~2.jpg > logo.dim_200x200.png)
Darken overall exposure slightly to work better as a hero background behind white text (1772177297346.png > hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
